_mechanic_argument: Optimizing for a measurable proxy always creates incentives to game the proxy rather than improve the thing it was supposed to measure.

meta.title: The Cobra Effect
meta.description: Design an incentive system and watch it backfire. A game about Goodhart's Law, perverse incentives, and the limits of consequentialist optimization.

scenario: A city has a rat problem. Design a bounty system to reduce the rat population.

policies.label: Per-rat bounty
policies.description: Pay citizens per dead rat delivered
policies.perverse_explanation: Citizens have started breeding rats to collect the bounty.

policies.label: Building inspections
policies.description: Fine landlords whose buildings harbor rats
policies.perverse_explanation: Landlords are hiding infestations instead of reporting them. Rats move to uninspected buildings.

policies.label: Sanitation funding
policies.perverse_explanation: Diminishing returns — the remaining rats have adapted to the new collection schedule.

policies.label: Poison stations
policies.perverse_explanation: Secondary poisoning is killing predator birds and cats. Without natural predators, surviving rats multiply faster.

reveal.closing_question: Did you optimize for the metric, or for the outcome the metric was supposed to represent?

rats_eliminated.what_the_player_did: You drove the rat count to zero — on paper. Check whether the system you built to get there is one you'd want to live inside.

perverse_triggered.what_the_player_did: At least one of your policies triggered its perverse incentive. The measure became the target, and it stopped being a good measure.

budget_exhausted.what_the_player_did: You ran out of budget before solving the problem. The policies you chose were expensive — but were they effective?

side_effects_high.what_the_player_did: Your policies had significant side effects. The rat population may have decreased, but the broader ecosystem paid for it.

balanced_outcome.what_the_player_did: You managed to reduce rats without triggering major perverse effects. Not every proxy was gamed. This time.
